query: how to create internal links between notes
notes: core Obsidian feature; 'Internal links' is the canonical term

notes: YAML frontmatter / note metadata; called 'Properties' in Obsidian

query: how to use tags to organize notes
notes: tagging system; Tags view is a UI companion

query: keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys
notes: Hotkeys is the settings panel; editing shortcuts covers editor-level bindings

query: canvas infinite whiteboard plugin
notes: Canvas is a core plugin for freeform note layouts

query: note templates reuse structure
notes: Templates plugin; Daily notes uses templates as well

query: search inside vault
notes: Search plugin for full-text search; Quick switcher is file-search

query: callout boxes and admonitions
notes: Obsidian's callout syntax (> [!info])

query: backlinks to a note
notes: Backlinks plugin shows incoming links to current note

query: daily notes journaling plugin
notes: Daily notes creates dated notes automatically

query: connect notes and see how they relate
notes: conceptual phrasing for the graph; may also surface internal links

query: insert pre-defined snippets of text into notes
notes: uses vocabulary from the file itself ('pre-defined snippets')

notes: knowledge graph is a synonym; backlinks is related

notes: Tags.md opens with 'Tags are keywords or topics'
